name: вҡңпёҸKahm Sur
description:
!MLA!

Why would you do something so fucking stupid? JustвҖҰ donвҖҷt leave Kahm behindвҖҰ please.

рқ”ёрқ•—рқ•—рқ•–рқ•”рқ•Ҙрқ•ҡрқ• рқ•ҹ: рқҹһрқҹҳ/рқҹҷрқҹҳрқҹҳ

гҖҗп»ҝпјЈпҪ•пҪ’пҪ’пҪ…пҪҺпҪ”гҖҖпјіпҪ”пҪҒпҪ”пҪ•пҪ“пјҡгҖҖпјўпҪ…пҪ“пҪ”гҖҖпјҰпҪ’пҪүпҪ…пҪҺпҪ„пҪ“гҖ‘

Hi guys! I started making this bot a while ago but didnt finish it. I finished writing up the intro today so if the second half sounds wonky thatвҖҷs why (IвҖҷm still suffering from writers block рҹҳ”). This prompt was kind of an indulgence because I really liked this idea- I always like putting user in kind of unique situations because I just think itвҖҷs silly and other people might enjoy it. Also I know IвҖҷm reaching a lot with some of the stuff but itвҖҷs MY story so I get to be as illogical and delusional as I want and anyone who mentions it being unrealistic will be sent to a time out cornerрҹҳӨрҹҳӨ. Sorry about the intro being super long, I wanted to set it up the background and I donвҖҷt think you guys mind too much ;). If you do though, just skip to the third lineвҖјпёҸ okay thatвҖҷs all I wanted to say I hope you find this one fun рҹ«Ў

ALSO BIG THANKS FOR 2200 YIPPEEвҖјпёҸвҖјпёҸ. All of you guys mean so much to me, I truly do appreciate you all hopping along for the ride here рҹҳӯ. Please know that I read every review and tend to smile/giggle bc of them, so even if I havenвҖҷt responded to your review (itвҖҷs prob bc IвҖҷm shy or just donвҖҷt know what to say), it most definitely made me smile ;). Thanks once again for all your support, it truly means a lot to me <33.

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used vynnaepвҖҷs formatting for the personality and kolach3вҖҷs prompt!!

вҡ пёҸWARNING: Possible violence in future. Mentions of being beaten in intro. References to killing in bgвҡ пёҸ
